_meta.description: Armor Class x Tier. 5 classes (Titan/Hellforge/Tempest/Echo/Expedition), 4 tiers (no Uncommon, no Mythic). Read by ArmorBase/ArmorTier via GameManager.data['armor'].
_meta.status: FIRST-PASS BALANCED (2026-07-05) — tier stats and class passives are now filled with dramatic-tier-jump first-pass values; still testable/pending playtesting, not locked final.
_meta._balanced: 2026-07-05 first-pass balance pass — testable values pending playtesting

schema.tiers.<Tier>.durability: hits absorbed before the armor breaks; degrades 1 per hit
schema.passive.<param>: class-unique passive strength — now filled with first-pass balanced value

_meta.tier_curve_note: First-pass balanced: tier stats are identical across all 5 classes (monotonic Common<Rare<Epic<Legendary with dramatic tier jumps); class identity comes from the now-filled passive. Player has 100 HP; pipeline is armor flat -> armor percent -> durability -> Toughness relic -> HP.
_meta._balance_note: Dramatic tier jumps by design: Common is a light chip-blocker, Legendary is a major mitigation layer (11 flat + 40% + 180 durability). Passives are tuned to be noticeable but not overwhelming.

passive.name: Bulwark
passive._desc: extra flat reduction on top of tier flat

passive.name: Tailwind
passive._desc: movement speed multiplier while worn (>1 faster)

passive.name: Dampen
passive._desc: multiplier on incoming debuff durations (<1 shortens)
